name: Assassin’s Creed: Hidden Rome – RPG
description: Explore Renaissance Rome as a fledgling Assassin under the guidance of Ezio Auditore. Navigate bustling streets, shadowed alleys, and rooftops, uncovering hidden secrets, spying on Templar plots, and engaging in stealthy or strategic confrontations. Every choice shapes your path, influencing allies, enemies, and the fate of the city. Train in parkour, combat, and tactics, earn recognition within the Brotherhood, and unlock new missions, weapons, and opportunities as you rise from novice to Master Assassin. Experience a living, breathing Rome where danger, intrigue, and opportunity await at every corner.
creator: EchoFreeman
